name: Chocolate Buttons
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Unsweetened chocolate (melted and cooled slightly)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl or the bowl of an electric mixer, mix together butter, sugar, melted chocolate, and vanilla until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing until well incorporated with each addition.
4. In a separate bowl, sift flour, baking powder, and salt. Stir dry ingredients into the batter. Cover; chill dough for 30 minutes.
5. Roll dough into 1-inch balls. Roll the balls in powdered sugar, then place them about 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake in a 350-degree oven for 12 to 15 minutes, or until edges are set. Remove from oven and immediately press chocolate nonpareils into the cookies.
7. Let cool for 1 minute before removing from the pan.
Makes 5 dozen.
